target_audience: Women aged 40-65 in the Scottsdale and Paradise Valley area with household income $400k+ who just bought a second home or are refreshing their primary residence for entertaining

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Interior designers who push their own taste instead of listening to what you actually want
pain_points_solutions.solution: Signature discovery process that maps your lifestyle and aesthetic before a single item is sourced

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Waiting 9 months for furniture that shows up damaged or wrong
pain_points_solutions.solution: In-house receiving warehouse where every piece is inspected before it enters your home

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Getting nickel-and-dimed with surprise trade markups and vague invoices
pain_points_solutions.solution: Transparent flat-fee pricing with trade discounts passed directly to you

offer: Complimentary 90-minute in-home design consultation and room vision board — reserved for qualified homeowners
risk_reversal: If you don't love the final design presentation, walk away with no further obligation
guarantees: Flat-fee transparent pricing, in-house receiving and inspection, dedicated designer assigned to your project
limited_availability: Accepting 4 new full-home projects per quarter — 1 slot remaining for spring 2026
lead_magnet: The Scottsdale Luxury Home Refresh Guide: 17 design moves that photograph for resale
top_stats: Featured in Architectural Digest, Luxe Magazine, and Phoenix Home & Garden
Completed 85+ luxury residential projects across Arizona since 2014
Average full-home project: $280k design budget, 6-8 month timeline
service_area: Scottsdale, Paradise Valley, Arcadia, and Desert Mountain
